case_title: THOMAS EVANS VS. MODERN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, A FLORIDA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, THOMAS JR AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, A FLORIDA CORPORATION MODERN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES OF FORT MYERS INC A FLORIDA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
